summary: LLM wiki bridge schema documentation aligned with existing offline bridge contract and all required validations passed.
raw: cargo validations passed: cargo fmt --check, llmwiki-bridge JSON parse smoke, cargo test --test e2e harness_cli (25 passed), cargo check -p jcode. selfdev build finished exit 0 using scripts/dev_cargo.sh build --profile selfdev -p jcode --bin jcode.
followUp: selfdev reload ainda falha por erro ambiental conhecido: Could not find jcode repository directory.

verification.commandOrCheck: cargo fmt --check; jcode-harness skills llmwiki-bridge --json | python3 -m json.tool; cargo test --test e2e harness_cli -- --nocapture; cargo check -p jcode; selfdev build target=auto

summary: Fixed selfdev repo discovery for nested crate manifest dirs, added release notes template, and validated build plus reload.
raw: Focused validations passed: cargo fmt --check, jcode-build-support get_repo_dir regression, find_repo ancestor test, cargo check -p jcode. selfdev build finished exit 0. Manual main-socket reload promoted shared-server to e20c118e-dirty-a70101b7947c and succeeded. The subsequent selfdev reload tool interrupted the session as expected and system reload reminder reported success: Reload succeeded (v0.11.99-dev (e20c118e, dirty) → e20c118e-dirty-a70101b7947c). selfdev status/debug server info show SocketReady and running v0.11.99-dev (e20c118e, dirty).
followUp: After committing, optionally run one more selfdev build/reload to move from dirty e20c118e build label to the clean commit label.

verification.commandOrCheck: cargo fmt --check; cargo test -p jcode-build-support get_repo_dir --lib; cargo test -p jcode-build-support find_repo --lib; cargo check -p jcode; selfdev build target=auto; selfdev reload
